Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shai]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Shai is Alin's youngest sister and is fourteen years old.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Shai is a character who has a pile of clockwork.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Shai is Alin's youngest sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Shai is a companion of Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Shai is part of Alin's party.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 24''' — Shai is missing and Alin believes she may have been eaten by a monster.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Shai is Alin's little sister and wields strips of Violet Light like whips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Shai is potentially an Elysian Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Shai wears a white-and-gold uniform.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
